name: Contemporary Jali
description: CNC laser-cut geometric flower-of-life pattern in brass on white frame. Modern luxury.

name: Modern Slatted
description: Dark wood horizontal slats with stainless steel frame and bar handles. Clean, contemporary.

name: Wood Plank with Studs
description: Horizontal wood planks with brass pyramid studs on steel frame. Bold and solid.

name: Wood & Brass Jali
description: Dark wood vertical planks with illuminated brass jali panel. Statement entrance.

name: Wood & Iron Scrollwork
description: Wood plank gate with wrought iron scrollwork bands. Heritage meets warmth.

name: Rosewood & Iron
description: Rich rosewood vertical planks flanked by wrought iron scrollwork side panels.

name: Fluted Steel
description: Vertical fluted steel panels with stone pillars and concealed automation. Minimal, contemporary.

name: The Patina
description: Stainless steel vertical slats with weathered patina finish. Industrial elegance.

name: The Cascade
description: Wood and stainless steel horizontal cascade pattern. Warm and contemporary.

name: The Stout
description: Coloured stainless steel panels with bold horizontal lines. Strong, minimal presence.

name: The Maharaja
description: Mild steel gate with ornate monogram medallion and dark finish. Regal statement entrance.

name: The Gothic
description: Cast iron and mild steel with ornate Gothic scrollwork and pointed finials. Timeless grandeur.

name: The Vault
description: Mild steel and brass arched gate with grid pattern and ornate scrollwork crown. Heritage craftsmanship.
